name: China Railway Signal & Communication Corporation Limited
summary: China Railway Signal & Communication Corporation Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides rail transportation control system solutions in China and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Rail Transportation Control System, General Construction Contracting, and Others. It offers design, consultancy, and system integration services for rail transportation control system projects; and integrated rail transportation solutions. The company also produces and sells signal system products, communication information system products, infrastructure equipment and information systems, and other related products. In addition, it offers construction, installation, testing, operation, and maintenance services for rail transportation control systems; and services relating to municipal engineering projects and other construction projects. Further, the company engages in the investment management, technical exchange and trade, and bidding agency activities, as well as provision of project management activities. The company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. China Railway Signal & Communication Corporation Limited is a subsidiary of China Railway Signal & Communication (Group) Corporation Limited.
